creator: jesusr@es.FreeBSD.org
text:
FreeBSD 3.0-RELEASE, can't detect the second ide controller and any of the discs connected to it.

Fix: 

Delete ide_pci.c entry (is the last one) from /sys/i386/conf/files.i386 and recompile the kernel.
How-To-Repeat: You can change the disposition or distribution of discs between the ide controllers and the second one is never detected by the kernel.
